Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Success: {d[""success""]}, Subjects: {len\(d[""data""]\)}''''\); [print\(f''''  {s[""name""]} \({s[""code""]}\): {len\(s[""chapters""]\)} chapters, {sum\(len\(c[""topics""]\) for c in s[""chapters""]\)} topics''''\) for s in d[''''data''''] if s[''''chapters'''']]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=d[''''data''''][''''topic'''']; print\(f''''Topic: {t[""title""]}''''\); print\(f''''Chapter: {t[""chapter""][""title""]}''''\); print\(f''''Subject: {t[""subject""][""name""]}''''\); print\(f''''Board: {t[""board""][""name""]}''''\); print\(f''''Content items: {len\(d[""data""][""contentItems""]\)}''''\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Results: {len\(d[""data""]\)}''''\); [print\(f''''  {r[""title""]} — {r[""chapter""][""title""]}''''\) for r in d[''''data'''']]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''{k}: {v[""name""]}''''\) for k,v in d.items\(\)]")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='Talipot@123' psql -U padvik -d padvik -h localhost -c "SELECT id, job_type, status, metadata->>''boardCode'' as board FROM scrape_jobs WHERE status IN \(''queued'', ''running''\) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='Talipot@123' psql -U padvik -d padvik -h localhost -c "UPDATE scrape_jobs SET status = ''failed'', error_log = ''Worker crashed - job lost from queue. Use Restart to resume.'', completed_at = NOW\(\) WHERE id = 16 AND status = ''queued'';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='Talipot@123' psql -U padvik -d padvik -h localhost -c "SELECT id, job_type, status, metadata->>''boardCode'' as board, metadata->>''aiProvider'' as ai, metadata->>''queueJobId'' as queue_id, created_at FROM scrape_jobs ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='Talipot@123' psql -U padvik -d padvik -h localhost -c "UPDATE scrape_jobs SET status = ''failed'', error_log = ''Worker connection issue - fixed. Restart to resume.'' WHERE id = 17 AND status = ''queued'';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='Talipot@123' psql -U padvik -d padvik -h localhost -c "SELECT id, job_type, status, metadata->>''boardCode'' as board, metadata->>''aiProvider'' as ai, metadata->>''queueJobId'' as qid, created_at FROM scrape_jobs ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD='Talipot@123' psql -h localhost -U padvik -d padvik -c "SELECT id, code, name FROM boards WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY id")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='Talipot@123' psql -h localhost -U padvik -d padvik -c "SELECT s.name, st.grade, b.code, count\(DISTINCT ch.id\) as chapters, count\(DISTINCT t.id\) as topics, \(SELECT count\(*\) FROM content_items ci JOIN topics t2 ON t2.id=ci.topic_id JOIN chapters c2 ON c2.id=t2.chapter_id WHERE c2.subject_id=s.id AND ci.is_published=true\) as published_content FROM subjects s JOIN standards st ON st.id=s.standard_id JOIN boards b ON b.id=st.board_id LEFT JOIN chapters ch ON ch.subject_id=s.id LEFT JOIN topics t ON t.chapter_id=ch.id WHERE b.code=''CBSE'' AND st.grade=10 GROUP BY s.id, s.name, st.grade, b.code ORDER BY s.name LIMIT 20")
